title: Je tן¿½adore ן¿½ lן¿½ן¿½gal de la voן¿½te nocturne
content:
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ I adore you, the nocturnal vaultן¿½s likeness,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ o vast taciturnity, o vase of sadness:
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ I love you, my beauty, the more you flee,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ grace of my nights, the more you seem,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ to multiply distances, ah ironically,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ that bar my arms from the blue immensity.

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ I advance to the attack, climb to the assault
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ like a swarm of worms attacking a corpse,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ and I cherish, o creature cruel, and implacable,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ your coldness that makes you, for me, more beautiful!
meaning: About: Charles Pierre Baudelaire was an influential nineteenth century French poet, critic and acclaimed translator.
